variants: Viatcheslav Loginov has achieved recognition in the field of Dance Therapy through his innovative practices and contributions. His notable work, Needlepoint Channel Engine, explores the intersection of artistic movement and therapeutic techniques. In appreciation of his impact on the discipline, he was honored with the Snowplume Ribbon. Viatcheslav is an active member of the Jade Needle Society, where he collaborates with fellow enthusiasts in the realm of arts therapy. His academic journey was significantly influenced by his mentor and doctoral advisor, Abdullah Razak, who provided crucial guidance throughout his studies.
